scenario.title: First Trial — Greeting Service
scenario.narrative: You are reviewing a tiny greeting helper. Every line of the function must execute at least once for Statement coverage.

claim: The single test T1 below achieves 100% Statement coverage.
hints: Statement coverage only asks: did every line of code execute at least once? Re-read Law Card 1.
There are 2 executable lines (the assignment and the return). Did T1 hit both?
Solution — Yes. T1 runs both lines exactly once, so Statement coverage is 100%. (Note: there are no decisions to test here, so Statement is the strongest applicable level.)
